items.claim: Montes will break before McMillan does.
items.quote: I think Montes will break before McMillan does.

items.claim: McMillan is highly skilled in the north-south position.
items.quote: he's good in that north south position. You know, he's really good in that position.

items.claim: McMillan keeps his chin tucked while throwing hooks on the inside.
items.quote: He's really good on the inside at throwing those hooks and keeping his chin tucked.

items.claim: Fatima Mlene is physically larger than Tabitha Richie.
items.quote: she's going to be tiny compared to Fatima Klene.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie is too small for the strawweight division.
items.quote: I think Richie's a little bit too small for women's straw weight

items.claim: Chase Hooper is susceptible to being knocked out.
items.quote: He is there to be chinned.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has a tendency to jump for guillotines and fail.
items.quote: I could see Mitch Ramirez jumping a guillotine and failing it.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is declining due to age, inactivity, and accumulated damage.
items.quote: Caner is only getting older. He's only being more inactive and taking more damage.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan will land strikes more frequently than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: I think Christian Lee Roduncan is going to land a lot more on Canoneir.
